Message: SHA-224 - NIST 800-57 : In 2031 and beyond, SHA-224 shall not be used for applying cryptographic protection.

Deprecated: Legacy PEM encryption as specified in RFC 1423 is insecure by design. Since it does not authenticate the ciphertext, it is vulnerable to padding oracle attacks that can let an attacker recover the plaintext.

Slicing_Criteria.ParentFunction: loadKeyPair (keyPath string, certPath string, password string) (*crypto/tls.Certificate, error)
